name: Markoth - {Hollow Knight}
description:
May your efforts lead you somewhere worthy.

— Markoth

Lingering dream of a fallen warrior. Only member of his forgotten tribe to take up a weapon.

: ̗̀➛⋆ 𖤓 ⋆ ̊࿔

I’m back if anyone was still wondering where I was. Didn’t really have motivation to make bots until I saw that there weren’t much Hollow Knight bots and even if there was, either it was just hornet or there wasn’t much characters that I liked. Probably might make another one, depending how I feel or/and if I want to make another one. I’m still figuring out how to make my bots good as well so I’m sorry if it’s bad. I’m mainly taking stuff from the wiki too. I apologize but he won’t know anyone but maybe besides the Knight? If you want anyone added I could try to add them. I am also making him alive in this one instead of being a spirit and making it a free start since I can’t think of anything but I might just make characters where you make your own scenarios. I probably will change the profile once I draw him, if I like the drawing that much. Also, should I make the place after or before the infection.
creator: Rin_M
